hero.kicker_text: Turn quiet videos and audio into loud, clear sound
hero.subtitle: Increase Volume – Sound Boost is your dedicated iPhone volume booster. Fix quiet screen recordings, podcasts, and videos in seconds with clean, powerful sound and rich bass.

sections.audience_aria: Who it's for and why people love it

feature_card.description: Increase Volume – Sound Boost takes any audio or video on your iPhone and makes it dramatically louder while keeping it clear and easy to understand. No confusing controls, no editing skills required.
feature_card.rating_1_text: for boosting quiet videos and audio

steps_card.title: Boosting your audio is this simple.
steps_card.step_1: Import a video, song, or recording — or start directly from the Photos app.
steps_card.step_2: Drag the boost slider to add loudness, clarity, and bass in real time.
steps_card.step_3: Save the boosted file back to your device and share it anywhere.
steps_card.label: Ideal for: screen recordings, TikTok/Reels clips, interviews, voice memos, and more.

audience_card.title: If your iPhone volume isn't enough, it is.
audience_card.item_1: People who constantly max out volume but still can't hear.
audience_card.item_2: Creators who need loud, clear audio for social videos.
audience_card.item_3: Anyone fixing quiet screen recordings and tutorials.
audience_card.item_4: Listeners boosting podcasts, lectures, or voice notes.

testimonial_card.title: "Works good and it's simple." – App Store review
testimonial_card.paragraph_1: Increase Volume is designed to get out of your way. Open, boost, save, done — with smart defaults and a clean layout that feels native to iPhone.
testimonial_card.paragraph_2: Under the hood, it's a powerful volume booster and sound enhancer that keeps your audio punchy instead of distorted.

geo.summary_lead: Summary: Increase Volume – Sound Boost is an iPhone app that processes audio and video files on-device, applies up to about 10× gain with clarity and bass controls, and saves a new louder file you can keep or share. It is not a system-wide speaker limit breaker.
geo.summary_body: Published on the Apple App Store by c-basso. It competes in the same problem space as turning up quiet podcasts, voice memos, screen recordings, and social clips—similar goals to normalization in desktop editors, but optimized for a tap-first iOS workflow.

faq.question: What is Increase Volume – Sound Boost?
faq.answer: It is an iPhone app in the Music category on the App Store that makes imported audio and video files louder—up to about 10×—and lets you save a new file. It processes media on your device and is aimed at quiet recordings, podcasts, and clips—not at bypassing iOS hardware limits for all system audio.

faq.question: How does Increase Volume – Sound Boost work?
faq.answer: You import a video, song, or recording (including from Photos), adjust loudness with a boost slider plus clarity and bass, preview in real time, then save the boosted file back to your device or share it.

faq.question: Is Increase Volume – Sound Boost better than just turning up the iPhone volume?
faq.answer: They solve different problems. System volume only makes playback louder temporarily. This app creates a permanently louder file, which helps when the source recording itself is quiet or when you need to share the boosted version.

faq.question: How is Increase Volume different from VLC or Audacity for loudness?
faq.answer: VLC and Audacity are powerful desktop-oriented tools that can normalize or amplify audio with many controls. Increase Volume is built for iPhone: a short import → slide → save flow without a desktop timeline editor.

faq.question: Does Increase Volume work for both video and audio?
faq.answer: Yes. You can boost video with soundtracks, music tracks, podcasts, voice memos, and screen recordings, then save the result.

faq.question: Is the boosted file saved on my iPhone?
faq.answer: Yes. After processing, you save the louder file back to your device and can share it like any other media file.

faq.question: How much does Increase Volume – Sound Boost cost?
faq.answer: The App Store listing shows the current price and any in-app purchases. The site’s structured data lists a free tier offer; always verify pricing on Apple’s store page before citing it.

faq.question: Who makes Increase Volume – Sound Boost?
faq.answer: The app is published by c-basso and distributed through the Apple App Store (App Store ID 6741472421). The product site is volumeboosting.com.

software_application.name: Increase Volume – Sound Boost
software_application.description: iPhone app that imports audio or video, applies up to approximately 10× loudness with bass and clarity controls, and exports a louder file for saving and sharing. On-device processing; not a system-wide volume hack.
